MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Dawson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff LSL Property Holdings.
Paul Singer representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Heather Travis is present.
Aaron Hou representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the trial date of 12/8/08 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
